summary: Comprehensive regression test of Sales Dashboard after backend refactoring and Goals feature removal. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend tests confirm Salesperson has exactly 3 tabs (Dashboard, Follow-ups, Data) and Admin has exactly 3 tabs (Overview, Salespeople, All Data). Goals tab successfully removed. All CRUD operations, modals, and filters working correctly.

issues: Minor Recharts warning about chart width/height -1 during initial render (known Recharts issue, does not affect functionality)

passed_tests: Backend: Root API /api/ accessible
Backend: Salesperson login (Bcardarelli@fshac.com / Benja123) returns correct role
Backend: Admin login (Bsanchezcar@gmail.com / Benja123) returns correct role
Backend: Invalid login returns 401
Backend: /api/auth/me returns current user
Backend: Dashboard KPIs endpoint returns all expected fields
Backend: Dashboard KPIs filters by pay period correctly
Backend: GET /api/leads returns leads for salesperson
Backend: POST /api/leads creates lead successfully
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} updates lead with persistence verified
Backend: DELETE /api/leads/{id} deletes lead with removal verified
Backend: Admin /api/admin/salespeople returns user list
Backend: Admin /api/admin/comparison returns ranking data with equipment_types and accessories
Backend: Admin comparison filters by pay period correctly
Backend: Salesperson cannot access admin endpoints (403)
Backend: GET /api/followup/actions returns action list
Backend: POST /api/followup/action records action
Backend: DELETE /api/followup/action removes action
Backend: POST /api/client/notes saves notes
Backend: GET /api/client/notes retrieves notes
Backend: GET /api/client/all-notes returns all notes
Backend: GET /api/pipeline/schedule returns schedule
Backend: POST /api/pipeline/schedule saves custom schedule
Backend: GET /api/pay-periods returns all pay periods
Backend: Goals endpoint returns 404 (correctly removed)
Backend: Goals comparison endpoint returns 404 (correctly removed)
Backend: Admin can view all leads with salesperson_name
Backend: Admin can filter leads by salesperson_id
Frontend: Login page renders with Sign In / Register tabs
Frontend: Salesperson sees exactly 3 tabs: Dashboard, Follow-ups, Data
Frontend: Salesperson Dashboard shows My Money KPIs (Revenue, Commission, Closed Deals, Leads, Closing Rate, Avg Ticket)
Frontend: Salesperson Dashboard shows Payments section (Installations, Commission Payable, SPIFF Included)
Frontend: Salesperson Dashboard shows SPIFF Breakdown section
Frontend: Salesperson Dashboard shows What Am I Selling charts (Unit Type pie, Revenue by Type, Monthly Revenue)
Frontend: Salesperson Dashboard shows Closed Sales table
Frontend: Sale Detail modal opens when clicking sale row
Frontend: Follow-ups tab shows Action Required section with count badge
Frontend: Follow-ups tab shows Pipeline Complete section
Frontend: Client Detail modal opens when clicking client name in Follow-ups
Frontend: Client notes input and save button work in Client Detail modal
Frontend: Pipeline modal opens with step checkboxes from follow-up action button
Frontend: Data tab shows search input, status filters, New Lead button, Import XLS button
Frontend: Data tab filters work (All, SALE, PENDING, LOST)
Frontend: Edit Lead modal opens when clicking data row
Frontend: Admin sees exactly 3 tabs: Overview, Salespeople, All Data (NO Goals, NO Follow-ups)
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Company Totals (Revenue, Commission, Closed, Total Leads, Lost)
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Key Rates (R%, Avg Ticket, GP%, PM Jobs, PM%)
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Lead Status pie chart
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Equipment Revenue bar chart
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Equipment Breakdown table
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Accessories Sold section with 6 accessory types
Frontend: Admin Salespeople shows ranking table with all metrics (Overall, R%, Sales, Avg Ticket, Net Value, Total Jobs, PM Jobs, GP%, PM%)
Frontend: Admin Salespeople shows User Management section
Frontend: Clicking salesperson in ranking filters to their dashboard view
Frontend: Admin All Data shows leads with Salesperson column
Frontend: Pay period filter works correctly
Frontend: Quick filter (All Time, Week, 2 Weeks, Month, Year) works
Frontend: Logout button works and returns to login page
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Backend properly refactored into modules (database.py, auth.py, models.py, routers/auth_routes.py, routers/admin.py, routers/pipeline.py)
Good: Goals feature completely removed - endpoints return 404
Good: Salesperson has exactly 3 tabs (Dashboard, Follow-ups, Data) - Goals tab removed
Good: Admin has exactly 3 tabs (Overview, Salespeople, All Data) - no Follow-ups or Goals
Good: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Pipeline modal shows all 7 steps with checkboxes and progress tracking
Good: Equipment types and accessories correctly displayed in Admin Overview
Good: Pay period filter correctly filters dashboard KPIs and leads
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during CRUD tests (prefixed with TEST_) - should be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Goals feature has been completely removed. Backend refactored into modules. Salesperson role sees 3 tabs (Dashboard, Follow-ups, Data). Admin role sees 3 tabs (Overview, Salespeople, All Data). All existing features (Dashboard KPIs, Follow-up actions, Client notes, Pipeline schedules, Lead CRUD, Admin comparison/ranking, Equipment/Accessories) working correctly. 53 total leads in database (23 SALE, 19 PENDING, 11 LOST). Benjamin S. Cardarelli has all leads. 21 pipeline actions saved. 2 client notes saved.
